{
  "nbformat": 4,
  "nbformat_minor": 0,
  "metadata": {
    "colab": {
      "provenance": [],
      "authorship_tag": "ABX9TyMGS20lcCTN0oKw83jDc9eV",
      "include_colab_link": true
    },
    "kernelspec": {
      "name": "python3",
      "display_name": "Python 3"
    },
    "language_info": {
      "name": "python"
    }
  },
  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "view-in-github",
        "colab_type": "text"
      },
      "source": [
        "<a href=\"https://colab.research.google.com/github/IamMubashir/Lab-1_Digital-image-processing/blob/main/Lab%201.ipynb\" target=\"_parent\"><img src=\"https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg\" alt=\"Open In Colab\"/></a>"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "4acaaccd"
      },
      "source": [
        "import cv2\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt"
      ],
      "execution_count": 1,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 0
        },
        "id": "feef9089",
        "outputId": "39d97625-d706-41e4-d059-f5e9f3a7c08f"
      },
      "source": [
        "image_path = '/Screenshot 2025-11-01 161059.png'\n",
        "print(f\"Using image: {image_path}\")"
      ],
      "execution_count": 2,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Using image: /Screenshot 2025-11-01 161059.png\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "cea65c3c"
      },
      "source": [
        "img = cv2.imread(image_path)\n"
      ],
      "execution_count": 3,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 0
        },
        "id": "9ca9d72c",
        "outputId": "a1427ab0-ec08-4c5b-b62f-3e249da9b5b3"
      },
      "source": [
        "if img is None:\n",
        "    print(f\"Error: Could not load image from {image_path}. Please check the path and file.\")\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"Image loaded successfully!\")"
      ],
      "execution_count": 4,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Image loaded successfully!\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 0
        },
        "id": "2b59aad7",
        "outputId": "dcbca6ec-96b2-40bd-d832-f92f9c91af69"
      },
      "source": [
        "if img is not None:\n",
        "    height, width, channels = img.shape\n",
        "    print(f\"Image Shape: {img.shape}\")\n",
        "    print(f\"Height: {height}\")\n",
        "    print(f\"Width: {width}\")\n",
        "    print(f\"Channels: {channels}\")\n",
        "    print(f\"Data Type: {img.dtype}\")\n"
      ],
      "execution_count": 5,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Image Shape: (264, 383, 3)\n",
            "Height: 264\n",
            "Width: 383\n",
            "Channels: 3\n",
            "Data Type: uint8\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 0
        },
        "id": "ccc84020",
        "outputId": "d6adccb4-aa6d-4663-ac44-6741d23ae7f9"
      },
      "source": [
        "if img is not None:\n",
        "    resized_img = cv2.resize(img, (300, 300))\n",
        "    print(f\"Resized Image Shape: {resized_img.shape}\")\n"
      ],
      "execution_count": 6,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Resized Image Shape: (300, 300, 3)\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 0
        },
        "id": "bf732f9f",
        "outputId": "d8760df0-8ffc-4e99-b700-7349e7147c4b"
      },
      "source": [
        "if img is not None:\n",
        "    h, w, _ = img.shape\n",
        "    # Calculate start and end coordinates for center crop\n",
        "    start_row = h // 4\n",
        "    end_row = 3 * h // 4\n",
        "    start_col = w // 4\n",
        "    end_col = 3 * w // 4\n",
        "\n",
        "    cropped_img = img[start_row:end_row, start_col:end_col]\n",
        "    print(f\"Cropped Image Shape: {cropped_img.shape}\")\n"
      ],
      "execution_count": 7,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Cropped Image Shape: (132, 192, 3)\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 0
        },
        "id": "57e53ff3",
        "outputId": "fb404b43-8f03-4b46-ab41-8f5af922e31c"
      },
      "source": [
        "if img is not None:\n",
        "    gray_img = cv2.cvtColor(img, cv2.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)\n",
        "    print(f\"Grayscale Image Shape: {gray_img.shape}\")\n"
      ],
      "execution_count": 8,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Grayscale Image Shape: (264, 383)\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 176
        },
        "id": "252d611a",
        "outputId": "ca6a5cb5-89aa-40d9-dbf2-04c96959d703"
      },
      "source": [
        "if img is not None:\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(15, 5))\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.subplot(1, 4, 1)\n",
        "    plt.imshow(cv2.cvtColor(img, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)) # Convert BGR to RGB for matplotlib\n",
        "    plt.title('Original Image')\n",
        "    plt.axis('off')\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.subplot(1, 4, 2)\n",
        "    plt.imshow(cv2.cvtColor(resized_img, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB))\n",
        "    plt.title('Resized (300x300)')\n",
        "    plt.axis('off')\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.subplot(1, 4, 3)\n",
        "    plt.imshow(cv2.cvtColor(cropped_img, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB))\n",
        "    plt.title('Center Cropped')\n",
        "    plt.axis('off')\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.subplot(1, 4, 4)\n",
        "    plt.imshow(gray_img, cmap='gray') # Grayscale image uses cmap='gray'\n",
        "    plt.title('Grayscale')\n",
        "    plt.axis('off')\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "    plt.show()\n"
      ],
      "execution_count": 9,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1500x500 with 4 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "0d262c96"
      },
      "source": [
        "Now that we've completed the main procedure, let's tackle the **Lab Tasks for Students**."
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 384
        },
        "id": "44ac27e1",
        "outputId": "d07719ac-0d8f-4e56-efad-e07cb3f098df"
      },
      "source": [
        "# Task 1: Resize the image to 200x200.\n",
        "if img is not None:\n",
        "    resized_200x200_img = cv2.resize(img, (200, 200))\n",
        "    print(f\"Image resized to 200x200. New shape: {resized_200x200_img.shape}\")\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(4, 4))\n",
        "    plt.imshow(cv2.cvtColor(resized_200x200_img, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB))\n",
        "    plt.title('Resized to 200x200')\n",
        "    plt.axis('off')\n",
        "    plt.show()\n"
      ],
      "execution_count": 10,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Image resized to 200x200. New shape: (200, 200, 3)\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 400x400 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 290
        },
        "id": "140799c8",
        "outputId": "9e880cf1-9cb2-4bba-b56d-245786f52074"
      },
      "source": [
        "# Task 2: Crop only the top-left region of the image.\n",
        "if img is not None:\n",
        "    # Let's crop the top-left quarter of the image\n",
        "    h, w, _ = img.shape\n",
        "    top_left_cropped_img = img[0:h//2, 0:w//2]\n",
        "    print(f\"Top-left cropped image shape: {top_left_cropped_img.shape}\")\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(4, 4))\n",
        "    plt.imshow(cv2.cvtColor(top_left_cropped_img, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB))\n",
        "    plt.title('Top-Left Cropped')\n",
        "    plt.axis('off')\n",
        "    plt.show()\n"
      ],
      "execution_count": 11,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Top-left cropped image shape: (132, 191, 3)\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 400x400 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 342
        },
        "id": "f272fc27",
        "outputId": "154e1723-4b1a-43aa-d023-f9408ebbadde"
      },
      "source": [
        "# Task 3: Convert the image to RGB format.\n",
        "if img is not None:\n",
        "    rgb_img = cv2.cvtColor(img, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)\n",
        "    print(f\"Image converted to RGB. First few pixels (original BGR):\\n{img[0,0]}\")\n",
        "    print(f\"First few pixels (converted RGB):\\n{rgb_img[0,0]}\")\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(4, 4))\n",
        "    plt.imshow(rgb_img)\n",
        "    plt.title('Converted to RGB')\n",
        "    plt.axis('off')\n",
        "    plt.show()\n"
      ],
      "execution_count": 12,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Image converted to RGB. First few pixels (original BGR):\n",
            "[0 0 0]\n",
            "First few pixels (converted RGB):\n",
            "[0 0 0]\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 400x400 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 0
        },
        "id": "b5b0f993",
        "outputId": "522b5c79-9608-42a6-b2f5-69af82bcbe18"
      },
      "source": [
        "# Task 4: Save the resized image using cv2.imwrite().\n",
        "if resized_img is not None:\n",
        "    output_path = 'resized_image_300x300.png'\n",
        "    cv2.imwrite(output_path, resized_img)\n",
        "    print(f\"Resized image saved to {output_path}\")\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"Resized image not available to save.\")\n"
      ],
      "execution_count": 13,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Resized image saved to resized_image_300x300.png\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 0
        },
        "id": "a19b3d4b",
        "outputId": "af8b46ff-deea-484d-a6c3-07b820c96726"
      },
      "source": [
        "# Task 5: Print only height and width without channels.\n",
        "if img is not None:\n",
        "    h, w, _ = img.shape # Using _ to ignore the channels\n",
        "    print(f\"Height: {h}, Width: {w}\")\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"Image not loaded, cannot print height and width.\")"
      ],
      "execution_count": 14,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Height: 264, Width: 383\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
